title: Auto-Output Behavior
discoveryHint: Use an electric machine to learn about auto-output.

sections.text: All machines have a Front Face (the obvious one) and an Output Face (marked with a dot or hole, typically the back). Machines can auto-output through their output face. Toggle auto-output for items and fluids separately in the machine GUI.

Right-clicking with a Wrench changes the output side. Shift-right-clicking changes the front side. The front side cannot also be the output side. By default, the output side does not accept item/fluid insertion, but this can be toggled with a Screwdriver.
Some unique machines like the Pump, Miner, Fisher, and Item Collector output through their Front Face instead.
